message:
test(robot,serve): expand snapshot test coverage, fix struct alignment, clean up imports

Tests (robot_test.go):
- TestPlanOutputStructure: relax from exact counts to non-nil assertions
- TestTailOutputStructure: add nil-check for Panes
- TestSnapshotOutputStructure: massively expanded with exhaustive
  field-by-field verification (timestamp, contract version, cursors,
  replay window, agents, beads summary, alerts)

Style fixes:
- cli/bind_test.go: struct field alignment formatting
- cli/root.go: robotOverlay flags struct alignment
- tui/dashboard/dashboard.go: import reordering (stdlib before
  third-party before internal per Go convention)
- tui/dashboard/dashboard_popup_test.go: remove trivial nil-check test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2233,10 +2233,10 @@ var (
 	robotEnsembleStopNoCollect bool   // skip partial output collection
 
 	// Robot-overlay flags for agent-initiated human handoff (br-a6cmp)
-	robotOverlay               bool   // open overlay for human handoff
-	robotOverlaySession        string // session for overlay
-	robotOverlayCursor         int64  // attention cursor for pre-focus
-	robotOverlayNoWait         bool   // return immediately without blocking
+	robotOverlay        bool   // open overlay for human handoff
+	robotOverlaySession string // session for overlay
+	robotOverlayCursor  int64  // attention cursor for pre-focus
+	robotOverlayNoWait  bool   // return immediately without blocking
 
 	// Robot-send flags
 	robotSend        string // session name for send
